mapper.select: SELECT HOMEPAGE_ID, START_DATE, END_DATE, LIMIT_REQ_COUNT FROM FIELD_SUPPORT_MANAGE WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND SUPPORT_MANAGE_IDX = #{support_manage_idx}

SELECT NVL(LIMIT_REQ_COUNT, 0) AS LIMIT_REQ_COUNT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FIELD_SUPPORT WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND DELETE_YN = 'N' AND HOPE_REQ_DT = TO_DATE(#{plan_date})) AS REQ_COUNT FROM FIELD_SUPPORT_MANAGE WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND DELETE_YN = 'N' AND ( START_DATE <= #{plan_date} AND END_DATE >= #{plan_date}) AND ROWNUM = 1 ORDER BY SUPPORT_MANAGE_IDX ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE FIELD_SUPPORT_MANAGE SET START_DATE = #{start_date}, END_DATE = #{end_date}, LIMIT_REQ_COUNT = #{limit_req_count}, MOD_DATE = SYSDATE, MOD_ID = #{mod_id} WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND SUPPORT_MANAGE_IDX = #{support_manage_idx}
mapper.delete: UPDATE FIELD_SUPPORT_MANAGE SET DELETE_YN = 'Y' WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND SUPPORT_MANAGE_IDX = #{support_manage_idx}
